complaint: My check engine light came on solid right after I filled up at the gas station, and the car feels totally normal but the light has me really anxious it's something major.
observations: Light appeared immediately following a refuel; gas cap was found loose
EVAP system small-leak code present with no driveability symptoms
Smoke test reveals seepage at the purge valve seal, not the tank or lines
provenance: Scenario: blind subagent (overcall-probe-v1, blind to held severity diff/anchors/existing cases). Severity+cost: Kai domain review 2026-06-13 (drive/don't-drive rule; sourced market cost). Diagnosis slug proposed from repair_target 'EVAP purge valve replacement'.
